name: fnb-caffe-container
description: F&B Caffe Container — Quán cà phê container phong cách F&B hiện đại tại Sa Đéc

scripts.minify:css: cleancss -O2 -o styles.min.css styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o dashboard/dashboard-styles.min.css dashboard/dashboard-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/checkout-styles.min.css css/checkout-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/loyalty-styles.min.css css/loyalty-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/ui-enhancements.min.css css/ui-enhancements.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/about-m3.min.css css/about-m3.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/loyalty-m3.min.css css/loyalty-m3.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/payment-modal.min.css css/payment-modal.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/kds-m3.min.css css/kds-m3.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/kds-styles.min.css css/kds-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/track-order-styles.min.css css/track-order-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/styles.min.css css/styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/admin.min.css css/admin.css
scripts.minify:js: terser js/script.js -o js/script.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/cart.js -o js/cart.min.js --compress --mangle && terser dashboard/dashboard.js -o dashboard/dashboard.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/menu.js -o js/menu.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/loyalty.js -o js/loyalty.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/loyalty-ui.js -o js/loyalty-ui.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/kds-app.js -o js/kds-app.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/checkout.js -o js/checkout.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/ui-enhancements.js -o js/ui-enhancements.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/i18n.js -o js/i18n.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/theme.js -o js/theme.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/reviews.js -o js/reviews.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/ui-animations.js -o js/ui-animations.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/sw.js -o js/sw.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.minify: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.build:full: npm run lint && npm run minify

author: Mekong CLI
